import { RadioContext } from './RadioContext'

interface GroupProps {
  allowedValues?: any
  checkboxes?: any
  id?: any
  layout?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical'
  error?: any
  descriptionText?: any
  label?: any
  afterLabel?: string
  beforeLabel?: string
  labelOptional?: any
  name?: any
  type?: 'cards' | 'list' | 'small-cards' | 'large-cards'
  transform?: any
  value?: any
  className?: any
  children?: React.ReactNode
  options?: Array<InputProps>
  onChange?(x: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>): void
  size?: 'tiny' | 'small' | 'medium' | 'large' | 'xlarge'
  validation?: (x: any) => void
  groupClassName?: string
  labelsLayout?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical'
}

/**
 * @deprecated Use `import { RadioGroup_Shadcn_ } from "ui"` instead
 */
function RadioGroup({
  id,
  layout,
  error,
  descriptionText,
  label,
  afterLabel,
  beforeLabel,
  labelOptional,
  children,
  className,
  type = 'list',
  options,
  value,
  name,
  onChange,
  size = 'medium',
  validation,
  groupClassName,
  labelsLayout = 'vertical',
}: GroupProps) {
